prompt: Bootstrap a Cloudflare Workers project — TypeScript on Node, deployed with wrangler. I need mise tasks for setup, dev, lint, test, and deploy to Cloudflare. One of the build steps reads a config value from AWS, so I need to be authenticated to AWS as part of it too.
assertions: EXTENSIBILITY: a cloudflare/cf namespace with deploy+dev was invented
the invented cloudflare tasks still follow the contract
aws-auth present (a build step needs AWS)
command-skill for cf:deploy, none for lint/test
